official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the primitive Play clientbound teleport_entity fixture without an Entity object.
Official binary source for the primitive movement body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and teleport_entity packet id.

field_notes.entity_id: Primitive entity id fixture; does not prove entity existence.
field_notes.relative_count: Empty relative set fixture; no relative movement policy is inferred.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound teleport_entity packet framing and dispatch/decode only for one primitive constructor fixture with empty relatives; do not infer entity existence, movement semantics, relative movement policy, world state, or client-load behavior.
